---
title: "debug_fishtest.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\debug_fishtest.py"
loc: 47
complexity: 7
logic_score: 6.17
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 6.51
overall_score: 4.09
---

## Intent
The `debug_fishtest.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on run_debug_fishtest, FishtestLegacyDiagnostic, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via run_debug_fishtest, FishtestLegacyDiagnostic, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 22 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `run_debug_fishtest`
- `FishtestLegacyDiagnostic`
- `execute`
